_meta.citation: ROADMAP SC-1 verbatim example: $400k @ 30yr; rates 0.06..0.08 step 0.005; baseline default (rates[0]=0.06). Phase 3 oracle anchor preserved at index 1 (0.065 -> 2528.27 per CONVENTIONS.md).

notes: loan_type='fixed' (not 'conventional'; Loan.loan_type Literal does not include 'conventional'; same correction as Plan 08-01 deviation #4 / Plan 08-02 deviation #2). Engine-emitted values captured via lib.stress.evaluate per D-05-01.
